feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Process Integration test tool SAP PO usages for migration to BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As you know we have a tool called Process Integration test tool in SAP PO.

We are planning to migrate the interfaces from SAP PO to Cloud Integration capability of Integration Suite.

Does that tool can be used while regression testing of migrating interfaces from SAP PO to Cloud Integration?

May I know the replacement of such tool in Cloud Integration capability of Integration Suite?

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Error while trying to migrate interface object from SAP PO to Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While trying to migrate interface object from SAP PO to Cloud Integration using migration tool, I get the following error in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration). I tried choosing different templates and the issue is not resolved and Could you please help us to resolve the issue, Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: Import message mapping from SAP PO to Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to import message mapping from SAP PO to Cloud Integration.

But, I get this error when trying to do so, could you help to know.

Can't we import the message mapping with parameterized mapping in to Cloud Integration?

I see there are parameters are being used in SAP, is that the cause of this issue while trying to migrate this mapping object from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: SAP PO Alert Rule Connection refused - Couldn't connecto to host
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an Alert Rule on sap po repository. I created a job on NWA, but when I release the job I get the following error:

does anyone know what causes this?

Thank you

entry.title: SAP PI Scenario Sender REST Query or Odata
entry.content:
We are migrating SAP Gateway to SAP PI and there is a scenario where it uses OData <-> RFC, this endpoint used now is similar: <url sap gateway>$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2'

For cause of application, we wil have to create a scenario to PI using a request with GET https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ... and I see OData Sender channel in PI, but I didn't fiund anything about this subject with, my question: Is it possible to build a similiar endpoint using:

https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ...

in SAP PI? Because we want there to be no incompatibility with the application that now consumes OData Gateway, so we want the url to be modified as little as possible.

entry.title: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have scenario where an external system makes a call to PI, then PI use that information to make a call to SAP and using the information returned from SAP, it makes another call to a third party API that will generate some data, that will passed to the original consumer (the external system). Also, the third party API uses OAuth 2.0, I don't know if this affects the scenario.

Is this scenario possible and/or is there a better aprocach to it? And how I would configure this in an ICO? 

Attached image for clarification

entry.title: In SAP PO we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP PO ,we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios. Is there a way to do it instead of manually extracting the list from ID ?

entry.title: SAP BTP IS (CI) vs SAP PO Comparison
entry.content: Hello, does anyone know if there is any SAP published document out there that shows a comparison between SAP BTP IS (CI) and SAP PO? I need one for a client.

entry.title: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template available
entry.content:
I have an ICO in SAP PO that I want to migrate.

1 sender (SOAP XI Protocol), content based routing, 2 receivers, both receivers have a mapping, both receivers have a REST receiver channel  with XML to JSON conversion. Synchronous scenario.

Migration assessment indicates that this is going to be a small migration effort.

However when migrating this interface no template is available (only default).

This is how the assessment should work? In the end you have to migrate manually or use default.

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: JMS Receiver channel ping issue.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While performing  the receiver ping channel, I am getting below error for Destination Test. Could you please suggest possible issue and solution.  But end to end message flow happing!! 

Error message in channel ping :

Destination TestChecks for a valid temporary destination object

Thanks,

T Chandar

entry.title: How to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page?
entry.content:
Hi, Who knows how to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page? If the contact information can record the owner info of sender or receiver system, it will be very helpful and useful for operation work with more efficiency and convenience.

Any feedback will be appreciated.

entry.title: How to create a REST API to accept undefined variables in URL & Headers?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
We need to develop an API in SAP PO that will be consumed by another system, but the requirement is in such a way that we should be able to accept API calls regardless of what’s sent in the {variable} part of the example URL below.
 
Example URL: https://host:port/RESTAdapter/{variable1}/{variable2}/{variable3}...../{variablen} where variables, parameters and number of variables & parameters are not predefined and can be anything.

Headers, payload structures & operations (GET, POST etc.) as well are all going to be variable. We would never know what the invoked URL, headers, payload structures and HTTP methods will be. Variables can be anything & everything is what we were told. These variables from sender are also expected to be captured by PO & utilized when making the connection with receiver. Please advise if this can be implemented.

entry.title: In NWDS when exporting mapping to spreadsheet the constant values are not visible
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am using NWDS mapping Export to spreadsheet and works fine however the constants show up as const() so the actual value is not visible.  What am i doing wrong?
In SapPoConst.jpg you can see part of the export and in SapPoVisual.jpg the actual definition from NWDS mapping visual editor.

Thx Danny.

entry.title: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi all,

Ive an issue regarding receiver determination based on a Source FileName.

Ive a file to file scenario without any ESR objects. 

The FileNames look like this:

CRM_12345_TimeStamp
CRM_<all Other Values>_TimeStamp

Based on the source FileName I need to send Files containing the value 12345 to Receiver 1 and all Files containing other values except 12345 to Receiver 2

I try this in the Iflow:

(ContextObject.FileName CP "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 1  --> This is working

(ContextObject.FileName != "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 2  --> This is NOT working

Ive red that (Not) Equal to with a Wilcard (*) is not working.

So what is the solution here? How can I achieve this and solve this issue?

Your help is appreciated,

Kind regards

John

entry.title: Hi, we are getting below error javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: sun.security.validator.Validator
entry.content:
Hi we are getting below error while uploading certificate in KX2 test system In SAP PI/PO.

Could you please suggest me to resolve the issue.

entry.title: REST API Call for downloading file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP PO 7.5 to download the file from AWS S3 bucket. so i have followed the blogs

(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-download-a-file-from-amazon-s3-buckets/ba-p/13419722)

 

on the same and have used "GET" call instead of PUT and interface is OK and getting response 200 in the monitoring. the file is coming in the payload and i have to download this file in some NFS folder.

Could you please let me know how can i get this file in the NFS folder directly. please note i am not using request/response(Sync) call here.

 

thanks

entry.title: PI/PO7.5 Background Job Processing Monitor -User roles
entry.content:
Hi,

Q1. Can you please suggest the user roles to restrict EDIT access for 'Background Job Processing Monitor' in PI/PO message monitoring. 

Configuration and monitoring home-->Monitoring-->Adapter engine tab-->Background Job Processing Monitor: Process Jobs

the current roles assigned to user are: SAP_XI_DEVELOPER_J2EE , SAP_XI_MONITOR_J2EE,SAP_XI_SUPPORT_J2EE,SAP_XI_RWB_SERV_USER.

Q2: When assigned the NWA_Readonly role, I am still able to see the 'Identity Management' section (display) and the list of users created. I would like to restrict access to the 'Identity Management' option; please suggest ways to hide it so that the user cannot view the list of all users created. I tried using the 'SAP_JAVA_NWADMIN_CENTRAL/LOCAL_READONLY' roles, but they restrict access to many other tools as well. So, I want to use the NWA_READONLY role, but it should not show the 'Identity Management' section.

Thank you.

entry.title: route message from SAP PI to SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you are doing well. 

i have requirement as from SAP outbound proxy is triggering and that interface name is same where same interface should trigger to SAP PI and SAP CPI based on the content condition from SAP.

which means in the content of the proxy sysname is coming where if sysname is "x" it should route to PI system, if sysname is "Y" it should route to SAP CPI. since same interface we are using i am unable to add it in sxmb_adm . can you please provide the options if any ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Madhu T

entry.title: SAP Process Integration (SAP PI PO) Local rule routing condition
entry.content:
Hello ,  

In integrated configuration , i have to add a condition like when zregiogroup = 'eng' or 'mech' and werks = 'p020' or 'p025' or 'p089' or... Then that needs to passed to receiver. Please find the attachment for reference. I'm not able to find the solution. Please help me!!
